positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a cheerful, retro-futuristic Shiba Inu dog wearing a pair of oversized, steampunk goggles. The dog is standing in a stylized, geometrically patterned meadow of oversized wildflowers and stylized golden-hour foliage. Strong, bold black linework defining the dog and plants. Limited color palette of burnt orange, sage green, indigo blue, and cream. Composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, with the dog as the central point of interest. Flat graphic design style mixed with subtle, dramatic atmospheric perspective. Vector art quality, perfect for apparel printing, ultra high detail, high contrast, isolated white background for printing versatility, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, ugly, poor quality, realistic photo, grain, bokeh, bokeh effect
